headline: Dr. Scott Gottlieb: Could see more hantavirus case, but don't think it will get out of control
summary: Former FDA Commissioner Dr. Scott Gottlieb joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the state of the hantavirus outbreak, risk of a wider outbreak, fate of FDA Commissioner Marty Makary, FDA's new flavored vape policy, and more.
